status.constitutionalAuthorityStatementText:
[Congressional Record Volume 172, Number 114 (Tuesday, July 14, 2026)]
[House]
From the Congressional Record Online through the Government Publishing Office [www.gpo.gov]
By Ms. VELAZQUEZ:
H.R. 9691.
Congress has the power to enact this legislation pursuant
to the following:
Article I, Section 8, Clause 3
The Congress shall have Power . . . To regulate Commerce
with foreign Nations, and among the several States, and with
the Indian Tribes.
[Page H4468]

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Small Business.

status.title: To amend the Small Business Act to modify the annual report of the Office of Credit Risk Management, and for other purposes.
